stadium: Harbor City Stadium — FIFA World Cup 2026 demo venue, capacity 68,500
amenities: Water refill stations at every concourse quadrant
Prayer and quiet room in North Concourse near Gate 2
First aid at East Promenade and Lower Bowl Section 112
Family restrooms in all four concourses
Merchandise flagship at South Fan Village
accessibility: Step-free routes are marked with green-and-gold signs. From Gate 12 / West Transit Hub use the covered Mobility Corridor to Gate 7, then Lift Bank W to any seating level. Mobility escorts can be requested at Gate 7 help point.
transit: Metro Blue Line Harbor Stadium stop is a 6-minute signed walk to Gates 1–2. Park-and-ride shuttles arrive at West Transit Hub for Gates 7–8. Rideshare pickup is at Cedar Loop, 9 minutes from Gate 8.
